name: google-cloud
description: BigQuery analytics, Cloud Storage management, and data pipelines using Google Cloud
long_description:
Full Google Cloud Platform integration for Chitty Workspace. Query and manage BigQuery datasets, upload and organize files in Cloud Storage, and build data pipelines — all through natural language.

**BigQuery** — Run SQL queries, explore schemas, create datasets and tables, insert data.

**Cloud Storage** — Upload, download, list, and manage files in GCS buckets. Perfect for staging data for BigQuery or sharing results.

Authentication uses your existing `gcloud` CLI credentials. No passwords or service account keys are stored by Chitty.

auth.instructions: This package uses your Google Cloud CLI (gcloud) credentials. You'll be prompted to sign in via your browser during setup.

setup_steps.label: Check for Google Cloud CLI
setup_steps.help_text: Google Cloud CLI is required. It will be installed automatically.

setup_steps.label: Sign in to Google Cloud
setup_steps.help_text: Opens your browser to sign in with your Google account. No passwords are stored by Chitty.

setup_steps.label: Set default project
setup_steps.prompt_help: Enter your GCP project ID. Find it at console.cloud.google.com

setup_steps.label: Install Python dependencies
setup_steps.help_text: Python libraries needed for BigQuery and Cloud Storage operations.

configurable_resources.label: BigQuery Datasets
configurable_resources.description: Select which BigQuery datasets the agent can access. The agent will only query, insert, or manage tables within these datasets.

configurable_resources.label: Cloud Storage Buckets
configurable_resources.description: Select which GCS buckets the agent can read from and write to.

feature_flags.label: Allow creating new datasets
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can create new BigQuery datasets in your project.
feature_flags.enable_warning: Creating datasets may incur storage costs.

feature_flags.label: Allow deleting datasets
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can delete BigQuery datasets and all their contents.
feature_flags.enable_warning: Deleting a dataset permanently removes all tables and data. This cannot be undone.

feature_flags.label: Allow creating new buckets
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can create new Cloud Storage buckets.
feature_flags.enable_warning: Creating buckets may incur storage costs.

feature_flags.label: Allow deleting objects
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can delete files from Cloud Storage buckets.
feature_flags.enable_warning: Deleted objects cannot be recovered unless versioning is enabled on the bucket.

agent_config.default_instructions: You have access to Google Cloud Platform tools. Always check the user's allowed datasets and buckets before performing operations. Prefer read-only operations unless the user explicitly asks to modify data.
suggested_prompts: List my BigQuery datasets and show me the tables
Run a SQL query on my dataset to find the top 10 rows
Upload this CSV file to my Cloud Storage bucket
Show me what's in my GCS bucket
capabilities: Run SQL queries on BigQuery datasets
Explore table schemas and row counts
Upload and download files from Cloud Storage
Create and manage datasets and buckets (when enabled)
